semantic.role: Central registry and type definition module for architectural visualization views within the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines the ViewDefinition TypeScript interface specifying metadata for each architectural view (ID, title, description, enabled status, requirements, outputs).
Maintains the VIEW_DEFINITIONS constant array as the canonical source of truth for all supported visualization outputs.
Provides derived VIEW_DEFINITION_MAP for efficient O(1) lookup of view definitions by ID.
Exports isViewId() type guard to validate if a string is a known ViewId.
Exports getViewDefinition() to retrieve a single view definition by ID.
Exports getDefaultEnabledViewIds() to return an array of view IDs that are enabled by default.
Exports normalizeViewIds() to separate input strings into known ViewId[] and unknown string[] for safe downstream processing.
outOfScope: Does not render or generate the actual views (e.g., diagrams, tables).
Does not persist or manage view configuration at runtime.
Does not handle CLI commands or user input parsing.
Does not interact with external services or databases.
invariants: All supported view IDs are defined in VIEW_DEFINITIONS and keys in VIEW_DEFINITION_MAP.
The interface ViewDefinition remains consistent across the codebase for type safety.
Utility functions (isViewId, getViewDefinition, getDefaultEnabledViewIds, normalizeViewIds) always rely on the canonical VIEW_DEFINITIONS/VIEW_DEFINITION_MAP.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a single source of truth for all architectural visualization views, ensuring consistent identity and metadata across the system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Establish the view registry as part of the v1.0.0 architectural governance layer, supporting semantic validation and safe view selection.

English.role: Central registry and type definition module for architectural visualization views within the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines the ViewDefinition TypeScript interface specifying metadata for each architectural view (ID, title, description, enabled status, requirements, outputs).
Maintains the VIEW_DEFINITIONS constant array as the canonical source of truth for all supported visualization outputs.
Provides derived VIEW_DEFINITION_MAP for efficient O(1) lookup of view definitions by ID.
Exports isViewId() type guard to validate if a string is a known ViewId.
Exports getViewDefinition() to retrieve a single view definition by ID.
Exports getDefaultEnabledViewIds() to return an array of view IDs that are enabled by default.
Exports normalizeViewIds() to separate input strings into known ViewId[] and unknown string[] for safe downstream processing.
outOfScope: Does not render or generate the actual views (e.g., diagrams, tables).
Does not persist or manage view configuration at runtime.
Does not handle CLI commands or user input parsing.
Does not interact with external services or databases.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine系统中用于架构可视化视图的中央注册表和类型定义模块。
responsibilities: 定义 ViewDefinition TypeScript 接口，为每个架构视图指定元数据（ID、标题、描述、启用状态、要求、输出）。
维护 VIEW_DEFINITIONS 常量数组，作为所有支持的可视化输出的权威数据源。
提供派生的 VIEW_DEFINITION_MAP，实现按 ID 进行 O(1) 时间复杂度的视图定义查找。
导出 isViewId() 类型守卫函数，验证字符串是否为已知的 ViewId。
导出 getViewDefinition() 函数，按 ID 获取单条视图定义。
导出 getDefaultEnabledViewIds() 函数，返回默认启用的视图 ID 数组。
导出 normalizeViewIds() 函数，将输入的字符串数组区分为已知 ViewId[] 和未知 string[]，以便安全地进行下游处理。
outOfScope: 不实际渲染或生成视图（如图表、表格）。
不持久化或管理运行时的视图配置。
不处理 CLI 命令或用户输入解析。
不与外部服务或数据库进行交互。
